---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for Valar
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature you'd like to see.

Keep requests aligned with the public beginner path unless you are intentionally proposing a change to the supported model surface.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Include CLI, daemon, app, or integration notes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about? Why did you prefer this one?

## Context

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| macOS version | e.g., Sonoma 14.5 |
| Apple Silicon chip | e.g., M1 Max |
| Related model / workflow | e.g., Soprano quickstart, Qwen VoiceDesign, VibeVoice preview |

## Additional notes

Links to prior art, related issues, or external references.
